prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约34573→35714→45409→41690→42525，整体呈波动后移趋势，2023年出现明显后移后2024年略有回升，2025年基准约42525名；该校在江苏物理类招生计划2021年18人、2022年19人、2023年18人、2024年17人、2025年13人，呈逐年递减趋势；2026年计划15人，较2025年扩招2人，扩招约15.4%，对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第120名，近年排名稳定在120名左右，属于中游211层次；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音学校热度排名第95，评价为一般，短视频平台关注度不高，报考热度无明显异常信号；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程等工科专业社会热度较高；江苏省2026年高考总报名约52.1万人，较2025年约35.8万人大幅增长约45%，其中物理类考生估算约38万人，竞争显著加剧；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距江苏较远，属于跨省就读，地域偏好上江苏考生对东北地区高校热度一般，该校在江苏招生规模较小（15人左右），地域因素对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+2人）缓解部分竞争压力、但江苏省考生总数大幅增加（+45%）加剧竞争、学校声誉平稳无异常信号，在2025年基准42525名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约46600名，区间46100–47100名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 34573 → 35714 → 45409 → 41690 → 42525, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023, followed by a slight recovery in 2024, with a baseline of about 42525 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 18 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 13 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year. In 2026, the plan is 15, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 15.4%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 120th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings around 120 in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin school popularity ranking is 95, rated as average, with low attention on short video platforms, showing no abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in enrollment majors, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity. The total number of Jiangsu Gaokao applicants in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% from about 358,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 380,000, leading to intensified competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Jiangsu, and is a cross-province study option. Jiangsu candidates generally have average preference for universities in Northeast China. The university's enrollment scale in Jiangsu is small (about 15 students), and regional factors have a neutral impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+2 students) partially alleviating competition pressure, but the significant increase in Jiangsu candidates (+45%) intensifying competition, and the stable reputation of the university with no abnormal signals, the ranking is expected to continue to shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 42525. The predicted minimum ranking is about 46600, with a range of 46100–47100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Artificial Intelligence
- Food Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- New Energy Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 46100–47100, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<46100), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Veterinary Medicine Top Talent Training Class and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>47100), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors.
